full_text:
Wang Bu 王布
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Bu (王布). General of Shouchun. Tried to mock Ji Zhi and Hong Qiu but this backfired. Wang Bu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
